## VID-019: Stomach Acid + Medication Absorption

**Working Title:** Your Stomach Acid Dropped 40% After 60 — Here's What It Does to Your Medications

### Title Variations (3)

| # | Title | Chars |
|---|-------|-------|
| T1 | Your Stomach Acid Dropped 40% After 60 — Here's What It Does to Your Meds | 68 |
| T2 | Why Your Medications Stop Working After 60 — The Stomach Acid Secret | 66 |
| T3 | 5 Medications That FAIL After 60 — The Doctor Explains WHY | 57 |

**Recommended:** T1 — combines specific statistic (40%) with age marker and consequence promise. The "Dropped 40%" is a concrete, shareable number that triggers curiosity. "Meds" is the colloquial term the target audience uses.

**A/B Test Plan:** T1 vs T2 for first 48 hours. T1 leads with the stat; T2 leads with the problem. Primary metric: CTR. Decision rule: if neither hits 4% in 24h, test T3.

### SEO Description

```
After 60, your stomach acid drops by nearly 40% — and that silent change could be making your medications stop working. Dr. Victor Kane explains the gastric pH mechanism that controls whether your body actually absorbs the drugs you're taking every day.

In this video, you'll learn:
• The 5 medication classes most affected by declining stomach acid (thyroid, calcium, iron, B12, and antifungals)
• Why proton pump inhibitors (PPIs) create a cascading absorption failure most doctors don't warn you about
• The "Medication Activation Gap" — the hidden window where your pills pass through your body without fully activating
• What specific tests and formulations to ask your doctor about (including liquid T4 and calcium citrate)
• A step-by-step protocol to review your current medications with your physician

This is not about stopping your medications — it's about making sure they're actually working. Dr. Kane walks through the real studies (Thyroid 2018, NEJM, Endocrine 2019) and gives you the exact conversation script to bring to your next appointment.

📌 TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 — The mystery: why medications stop working after 60
1:42 — How stomach acid actually activates your pills
3:15 — The 5 drug classes most affected
5:30 — The PPI cascade: when acid blockers make things worse
8:10 — What to ask your doctor (specific tests + formulations)
10:45 — Dr. Kane's medication review protocol

🔔 Subscribe for evidence-based health insights for adults over 60.
New videos every week — mechanism-first explanations you won't find anywhere else.

⚠️ Disclaimer: This video is for educational purposes only. Always consult your physician before making any changes to your medications.

#StomachAcid #MedicationAbsorption #Over60Health #DrVictorKane #GastricPH #PPI #ThyroidMedication #CalciumAbsorption #SeniorHealth #MedicationSafety
```

## VID-020: Iron Deficiency (Normal Labs, Starving Cells)

**Working Title:** Your Iron Levels Look Normal After 60 — But Your Cells Are Starving

### Title Variations (3)

| # | Title | Chars |
|---|-------|-------|
| T1 | Your Iron Levels Look Normal After 60 — But Your Cells Are Starving | 65 |
| T2 | "Normal" Iron After 60? The Doctor Explains Why You're Still Tired | 64 |
| T3 | The Ferritin Mask: Why Your Iron Test Lies After 60 | 52 |

**Recommended:** T1 — the "normal vs. starving" contradiction is the core hook. It directly addresses the viewer's frustration (being told they're fine when they feel terrible). The word "starving" is visceral and emotionally resonant.

**A/B Test Plan:** T1 vs T2 for first 48 hours. T1 leads with the paradox; T2 leads with the emotional symptom (tired). Primary metric: CTR. Decision rule: if neither hits 4% in 24h, test T3 ("Ferritin Mask" is more niche but highly clickable for health-literate viewers).

### SEO Description

```
Your blood test says your iron is "normal" — so why are you exhausted, breathless, and struggling to think clearly? Dr. Victor Kane reveals the hidden testing gap that leaves millions of adults over 60 with undiagnosed functional iron deficiency.

In this video, you'll learn:
• Why ferritin — the standard iron test — can be "normal" while your cells are actually iron-starved
• The sTfR test (soluble transferrin receptor) that detects what ferritin misses — and the exact script to request it from your doctor
• The 3 hidden iron drains most seniors don't know about (medication-related, gut-related, and chronic inflammation)
• Why supplementing iron without evaluating your GI tract first can be dangerous
• A word-for-word conversation script to bring to your next doctor's appointment

Dr. Kane walks through the real evidence: a Lancet Haematology meta-analysis showing sTfR detects 22% more cases, a 2023 study finding 40% of seniors with normal ferritin had functional deficiency, and new 2024 research linking the gap to cardiovascular risk.

This is the "Ferritin Mask" framework — and once you understand it, you'll never look at a standard blood panel the same way again.

📌 TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 — "Your iron is normal" — but you still feel terrible
1:35 — How the standard iron test works (and why it fails)
3:50 — The Ferritin Mask explained
6:10 — The sTfR test: what it is and how to ask for it
8:25 — The 3 hidden iron drains after 60
11:00 — Why you shouldn't just take iron supplements
13:15 — Word-for-word doctor conversation script

```
